_comment: Record 1 — VALID. Minor incident at a payment institution, investigating status, all timelines within DORA requirements.
incident_title: Payment Gateway Latency Spike — Intermittent Timeouts
incident_description: Elevated latency observed on payment processing gateway between 09:00 and 09:45 UTC. Approximately 2% of transactions experienced timeouts. No data loss reported.

_comment: Record 2 — VALID. Significant incident at a credit institution, resolved, root cause provided, remediation date recorded.
incident_title: Core Banking System Outage — Batch Processing Failure
incident_description: Core banking batch processing failed to complete overnight run due to database connection pool exhaustion. End-of-day account balances delayed by 4 hours. Affected 18,000 customer accounts.
affected_services: Core Banking System, Account Balance Reporting, SWIFT Messaging
root_cause: Database connection pool exhausted due to a misconfigured query introduced in the v2.14.1 deployment on 2026-03-23. Long-running queries consumed all available connections.

_comment: Record 3 — VALID. Major incident at an investment firm, post_incident_review stage, final report within 30 days, root cause provided.
incident_title: Trading System Unavailability — Market Hours Impact
incident_description: Trading execution system unavailable for 47 minutes during morning session on 2026-03-10. Order routing to LSE and Euronext venues suspended. Estimated client impact: 340 orders not executed at intended prices.
affected_services: Order Management System, FIX Gateway, Risk Engine
root_cause: Memory leak in the order routing module introduced by a third-party vendor patch. JVM heap exhaustion triggered a full GC pause cascade which caused the FIX gateway to disconnect.

_comment: Record 4 — INVALID. entity_type is 'bank' which is not in the DORA Article 2 lookup (must be credit_institution, investment_firm, etc.). Everything else is valid.
incident_description: Mobile app biometric authentication unavailable for 25 minutes due to certificate expiry on authentication service.

_comment: Record 5 — INVALID. incident_classification is 'major' but root_cause is missing — required_if rule violated. early_warning_timestamp is more than 1 day after detection_timestamp — date_diff max:1 violated.
incident_description: Primary data centre network switch failure caused 3-hour outage across clearing services.
affected_services: Clearing Engine, Settlement System, Member Portal

_comment: Record 6 — INVALID. remediation_status is 'post_incident_review' but final_report_date is missing — required_if rule violated. incident_classification is 'critical' which is not in the allowed lookup (major, significant, minor).
incident_description: Policy administration database corrupted following failed migration. 5,000 policy records temporarily inaccessible.
root_cause: Database migration script had an untested rollback path. Partial migration left referential integrity constraints broken.
